hero.title: Build premium landing pages faster with a reusable starter
hero.description: This white-label app includes routing, design tokens, responsive blocks, and reusable components ready to adapt for any business niche.

hero2.title: Visual hero with prop-based variants
hero2.description: Use variant="a" or variant="b" to switch the style without duplicating components while keeping your white-label base ready.
hero2.imageAlt: Smiling person in alternate hero block

aboutTeaser.title: About teaser to present your value proposition
aboutTeaser.description: This block summarizes core strengths and routes users to a deeper detail page.
aboutTeaser.point1: Compatible with white-label and multi-industry projects
aboutTeaser.point2: Decoupled copy and image for quick adaptation
aboutTeaser.point3: Configurable CTA to fit your funnel

servicesBlock2.title: Featured Services (Reusable Block)
servicesBlock2.description: Expanded services grid with key points and support chips.
servicesBlock2.intro: Use it when you need to explain services clearly at scale with a structure ready for larger catalogs.

ctaStrip.title: Conversion-focused CTA strip
ctaStrip.description: Ideal for pushing quick booking via WhatsApp or phone with minimal friction.

socialLinksBlock.title: Social Links (Reusable Component)
socialLinksBlock.description: Social icon set ready to use in footer, contact, or promotional sections.

servicesBlock.title: Reusable Service Cards Carousel
servicesBlock.description: Click-and-drag loop carousel with mobile autoplay that you can reuse in landing pages.

testimonialsBlock.title: Testimonials Section
testimonialsBlock.description: Simple reusable card grid for social proof.

contactBlock.title: Contact Block
contactBlock.description: Reusable contact section with form + map.

feedback.success: Message sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
feedback.error: We could not send your message. Please try again in a moment.

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: This route is not available in the starter kit.

footer.title: Landing Starter Kit
footer.description: Reusable React + Tailwind + Router foundation for fast client delivery.
footer.rights: © 2026 Landing Starter Kit. Built for reusable freelance workflows.

generalConsultation.title: General Consultation
generalConsultation.description: Comprehensive evaluation to identify current status and top priorities.

cardiologyConsultation.title: Cardiology Consultation
cardiologyConsultation.description: Specialized service block for cases requiring cardiac monitoring.

traumatologyConsultation.title: Traumatology Consultation
traumatologyConsultation.description: Care for mobility issues and functional recovery.

dermatologyConsultation.title: Dermatology Consultation
dermatologyConsultation.description: Skin and coat care focused on root causes.

ophthalmologyConsultation.title: Ophthalmology Consultation
ophthalmologyConsultation.description: Eye checkups for detection and prevention of visual complications.

abdominalUltrasound.title: Abdominal Ultrasound
abdominalUltrasound.description: Complementary study to support diagnosis and treatment decisions.

landingArchitecture.title: Landing Architecture
landingArchitecture.description: Prebuilt sections to launch polished one-page and multipage websites.

designTokens.title: Design Tokens
designTokens.description: Centralized colors and spacing to rebrand projects in minutes.

reusableComponents.title: Reusable Components
reusableComponents.description: Buttons, cards, headers, and content blocks built for speed.

responsiveFirst.title: Responsive First
responsiveFirst.description: Layouts tuned for mobile, tablet, and desktop from day one.

showcasePage.title: Showcase Page
showcasePage.description: A /components view to audit reusable UI before project delivery.

projectOwner.name: Project Owner
projectOwner.text: The starter kit reduced setup time and gave us a clean structure for future client pages.

frontendDeveloper.name: Frontend Developer
frontendDeveloper.text: Reusable blocks and tokens made branding changes extremely fast.

freelanceTeam.name: Freelance Team
freelanceTeam.text: We now clone one repo and ship customized landings in a fraction of the time.
